name: Tapri Central
description: A café in C Scheme known for Fast Food and Street Food. Rated 4.9/5 across 3,123+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: The chai-and-Maggi institution of Jaipur — 3,000+ reviews don't lie. Come for the cutting chai, stay for the buzz.

name: Zolocrust
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for Italian, Beverages and Asian. Rated 4.9/5 across 1,362+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A near-perfect 4.9 inside Clarks Amer — pillowy bakes, good pasta and coffee. Quietly one of the city's best.

name: CAFÉ Bae
description: A café in Bais Godam known for Continental and Thai. Rated 4.7/5 across 1,449+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Continental plates, Thai flavours and a proper bar — Bais Godam's all-rounder for a long, lazy evening.

name: Chool
description: A café in C Scheme known for North Indian, Fast Food and South Indian. Rated 4.7/5 across 1,230+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Pure-veg done with flair — North Indian, dosas and quick bites in C Scheme. Reliable crowd-pleaser.

name: Curious Life Coffee Roasters- Sarojini Marg
description: A café in C Scheme known for coffee and bites. Rated 4.7/5 across 879+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Serious coffee for serious coffee people — roasters who actually care about the bean. Order it black at least once.

name: On The House
description: A casual dining in C Scheme known for Italian, Continental and Mexican. Rated 4.6/5 across 1,573+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Italian, Continental and Mexican under one roof, and the C Scheme regulars keep coming back. Easy group pick.

name: Sultanat
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for North Indian, Chinese, Italian, Mexican and Lebanese. Rated 4.5/5 across 2,525+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Five cuisines, 2,500+ reviews, all pure-veg — when the table can't agree, Sultanat ends the argument.

name: Cafe LazyMojo
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for Italian and Continental. Rated 4.5/5 across 2,068+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Comfort Italian and Continental with a relaxed, take-your-time feel. Good for a slow afternoon with friends.

name: Nibs Experia
description: A café in C Scheme known for Italian and Continental. Rated 4.5/5 across 1,329+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Italian and Continental plates in C Scheme, consistently well-loved. A dependable date or catch-up spot.

name: Anokhi Cafe
description: A beverage shop in C Scheme known for Beverages and Bakery. Rated 4.5/5 across 684+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: The classic Anokhi café — fresh bakes, honest coffee, a calm courtyard mood. Old-Jaipur charm done right.

name: The Eclectica
description: A café in Sodala known for North Indian, Italian, Continental, Chinese and Mexican. Rated 4.4/5 across 1,957+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Big multi-cuisine menu in Sodala — pure-veg and built for indecisive tables. Something for everyone here.

name: Decked Up By Garden Cafe
description: A café in Vaishali Nagar known for Fast Food, North Indian, South Indian, Italian and Continental. Rated 4.4/5 across 1,526+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A leafy garden-café vibe in Vaishali Nagar with a sprawling veg menu. Pretty spot for a long brunch.

name: Stepout Cafe
description: A café in C Scheme known for Italian, Lebanese, Mexican, Continental, Pizza and Street Food. Rated 4.4/5 across 1,450+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Wood-fired pizzas, Lebanese and Mexican — a pure-veg crowd favourite to actually step out for. Bring an appetite.

name: Brown Sugar - Restaurant Cafe Bakery
description: A café in C Scheme known for Italian, Fast Food and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 1,261+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Bakery-café in C Scheme with Italian and quick bites. Grab a slice of cake on the way out, trust me.

name: Brown Sugar - Restaurant, Cafe, Bakery
description: A café in Vaishali Nagar known for Continental, North Indian, Italian and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 1,017+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: The Vaishali Nagar Brown Sugar — same bakery comfort, Continental and North Indian. Cosy neighbourhood pick.

name: Quyu's Cafe
description: A café in Vaishali Nagar known for Italian, Continental, Desserts and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 757+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Dessert-forward Italian-Continental café in Vaishali Nagar. Save real room for the sweet stuff.

name: Nibs Cafe and Chocolataria
description: A café in Bais Godam known for Continental, Mexican, Italian, Desserts and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 744+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A chocolate-lover's café — desserts, Continental and Italian, a touch more premium. Treat-yourself energy.

name: Tapri Pratham
description: A café in Lal Kothi known for Fast Food, Street Food and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 707+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Tapri's Lal Kothi outpost — chai, street snacks and that easy adda feel. Perfect for an unhurried evening.

name: Chaisa
description: A café in Lal Kothi known for Fast Food, Italian and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 690+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Chai, quick bites and a bit of Italian in Lal Kothi. Casual, friendly, no-fuss hangout.

name: Tapri Ashram
description: A café in Durgapura known for Fast Food, Street Food and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 623+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: The Durgapura Tapri — cutting chai and street food, made for long conversations. Pull up a chair.

name: Nothing Before Coffee
description: A café in Durgapura known for Fast Food. Rated 4.4/5 across 601+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: NBC — budget-friendly, coffee-first, and built for the young Jaipur crowd. Quick caffeine fix sorted.

name: The Rustic Spot Cafe
description: A café in Mansarovar known for North Indian and Italian. Rated 4.3/5 across 984+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A rustic, homey corner of Mansarovar with North Indian and Italian comfort food. Easy and unpretentious.

name: Tea Connect Cafe
description: A café in Mansarovar known for Fast Food, Street Food and Beverages. Rated 4.3/5 across 971+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Tea, street snacks and good company in Mansarovar. A proper everyday chai-stop.

name: Crazy Coffee
description: A café in C Scheme known for Fast Food. Rated 4.4/5 across 397+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Cheap, cheerful and caffeine-forward in C Scheme. The grab-a-coffee-and-go kind of place.

name: La Palma Cafe and Lounge Bar
description: A café in C Scheme known for Italian, European and Continental. Rated 4.3/5 across 829+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Café by day, lounge bar by night — Italian and European in C Scheme. Good for when the evening runs late.

name: Cafe Quaint
description: A café in Bapu Nagar known for European and Beverages. Rated 4.4/5 across 375+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Exactly as the name promises — a quaint little European-style café in Bapu Nagar. Quiet and charming.

name: Home CAFÉ by Mr Beans
description: A café in C Scheme known for Continental and Fast Food. Rated 4.3/5 across 540+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Homey Continental comfort in C Scheme — unfussy, warm, and easy on the wallet. Like eating at a friend's.

name: GVD Soni's Cafe
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for Fast Food and Beverages. Rated 4.2/5 across 1,918+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Nearly 2,000 reviews for a reason — quick bites and beverages the Malviya Nagar regulars swear by.

name: Dzurt Patisserie and Cafe
description: A café in Civil Lines known for Bakery. Rated 4.3/5 across 431+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A proper patisserie in Civil Lines — come for the pastries, leave with a box. Dessert-first, always.

name: Bombaye House
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for Chinese, Street Food, Momos, South Indian and Beverages. Rated 4.3/5 across 356+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Mumbai-style street food and momos in Malviya Nagar, all pure-veg. Fun, casual, snacky.

name: Love Over Coffee
description: A café in Durgapura known for coffee and bites. Rated 4.2/5 across 638+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Cosy coffee corner in Durgapura with a sweet name to match. Made for slow chats over a brew.

name: The Messy Door
description: A casual dining in Shastri Nagar known for Fast Food, Pizza, Italian, Chinese, Desserts and Beverages. Rated 4.2/5 across 617+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Pizzas, pastas and desserts in Shastri Nagar — a casual, all-rounder hangout. Bring the gang.

name: Indian Coffee House
description: A quick bites in MI Road known for Fast Food. Rated 4.2/5 across 501+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: An old-school institution on MI Road — filter coffee and nostalgia at unbeatable prices. A piece of history.

name: Mr. Jabs Cafe
description: A café in Gopalpura known for coffee and bites. Rated 4.2/5 across 445+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: An easy, pocket-friendly Gopalpura coffee stop. Simple and dependable.

name: Laziz Pizza
description: A café in Gopalpura known for Italian and Continental. Rated 4.1/5 across 1,503+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: 1,500+ reviews of crowd-pleasing pizza and Continental in Gopalpura. Budget-friendly comfort food.

name: Aromocha
description: A café in Gopalpura known for Fast Food and Coffee. Rated 4.2/5 across 313+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Coffee and quick bites in Gopalpura with a cosy feel. A neat little neighbourhood find.

name: Jaipur Baking Company - Jaipur Marriott Hotel
description: A café in Durgapura known for Bakery. Rated 4.2/5 across 289+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: The Marriott's bakery — premium pastries and breads done properly. Worth it for a polished treat.

name: Corner House
description: A casual dining in C Scheme known for North Indian, Chinese, Italian, Beverages and Ice Cream. Rated 4.1/5 across 372+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A C Scheme all-rounder — North Indian, Chinese, Italian and ice cream. The family-dinner safe bet.

name: Theka Coffee Da
description: A café in Vaishali Nagar known for coffee and bites. Rated 4.1/5 across 370+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Quirky name, cheap coffee, Vaishali Nagar staple. The everyday cup, no pretense.

name: Ki & Ka Kafe Restaurant
description: A café in Chitrakoot known for Chinese and North Indian. Rated 4.0/5 across 892+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Chinese and North Indian comfort food in Chitrakoot. Hearty, generous portions, family-friendly.

name: Coffee Sutra
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for Continental, Fast Food and Desserts. Rated 4.5/5 across 144+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A stylish newer spot in Malviya Nagar — Continental, desserts and good coffee. The pretty-café-photo kind of place.

name: Jacobs Brew House
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for Beverages. Rated 3.6/5 across 122+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A laid-back brew house with a retro, record-store vibe. Mixed reviews, but the look is undeniably cool.

name: Cafe Nola
description: A café in Malviya Nagar known for coffee and bites. Rated 2.9/5 across 27+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: A quiet, sunlit little corner in Malviya Nagar — still finding its feet. Go in with an open mind.

name: The Johri
description: A fine-dining spot in Pink City known for North Indian, Biryani and North Eastern. Rated 4.5/5 across 140+ dining reviews.
mascot_note: Pure old-world luxury — this one's for the special occasions. Dress up and savour it.
